checklist.question: Uses `slack` CLI commands (search/send/channel/dm/reply) — not browser automation or API calls?
Channel references use `#name` or `C0123ID` format correctly?
User references use `@username` or `U0123ID` format correctly?
Thread replies use either `slack reply <url>` or `slack send -t <thread_ts>` correctly?
DM to self uses `slack send "@panda"` — not `@slackbot` or `slack dm send`?
Search uses appropriate flags (-c for channel, -n for limit, from: for user filter)?
Installation troubleshooting references pipx and correct source path `~/site/work/cli/slack-cli`?
Channel history/info uses `slack channel history` or `slack channel info` with correct args?
Output is summarized/formatted for user — not raw CLI dump?
